ol.li: Free list storage: Every free block must hold a void* pointer (8 bytes)
CPU alignment: Misaligned access causes penalties or faults
Block boundaries: If base is aligned and block_size is aligned, every block N is aligned

div.p: requested_size User's desired block size (any value ≥ 0)
Final block_size ✓ ≥ sizeof(void*) ✓ Multiple of alignment ✓ All blocks aligned
Input: requested_size = 5 Step 2: 5 < 8 → block_size = 8 Step 3: (8 + 15) & ~15 = 23 & 0xF0 = 16 Output: 16 bytes
Input: requested_size = 64 Step 2: 64 ≥ 8 → block_size = 64 Step 3: (64 + 15) & ~15 = 79 & 0xF0 = 64 Output: 64 bytes
Input: requested_size = 100 Step 2: 100 ≥ 8 → block_size = 100 Step 3: (100 + 15) & ~15 = 115 & 0xF0 = 112 Output: 112 bytes
